transcript: Speaker A (Trisha): Myself Trisha. Speaker B (Co-learner): Hi Trisha, I'm Dhanush and I'm from Telangana. What about you? Speaker A: Hello, I'm Trisha, coming from Kanchipuram. I work in Sales. You also here to learn English? Speaker B: Yes Trisha, I started practicing 20 days ago. And you? Speaker A: Hey, I'm Trisha. Though I'm originally from Kanchipuram, I'm working in field sales in Chennai. So, how long have you been using MySivi? Speaker C (Co-learner): Hi madam, I'm Rajan. Just now installed this application. Speaker A: Don't worry Rajan, you'll definitely get good at English. Keep practicing daily, okay? So, where's your hometown? Speaker A (in Tamil): இங்கிலீஷ் பேச பார்ட்னர்ஸ் வேணுமா? MySivi-ல 50 லட்சம் co-learners இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கிட்டு இருக்காங்க. இவங்க எல்லாரும் ரொம்ப சப்போர்ட்டிவ். சோ இவங்க கூட பேசி நீங்க கான்ஃபிடென்ட்டா இங்கிலீஷ் பேச ஆரம்பிக்கலாம். ரெடியா? இப்பவே MySivi-ய இன்ஸ்டால் பண்ணி இங்கிலீஷ் பேச ஆரம்பிங்க. [Do you need partners to speak English? On MySivi, 50 lakh co-learners are learning English. They are all very supportive. So by speaking with them, you can start speaking English confidently. Ready? Install MySivi now and start speaking English.]
on_screen_text: Day:01 Progress: 22% Myself Trisha, Hi Trisha, What about you. Day:07 Progress: 54% Hello, I'm Trisha, coming from Kanchipuram, I work in Sales, You also here to learn English? Yes Trisha, I started practicing 20 days ago, and you? Day:15 Progress: 87% Hey, I'm Trisha, Though I'm originally from Kanchipuram, I'm working in field sales in Chennai, So, how long have you been using MySivi? Hi madam, I'm Rajan, Just now installed this application, Don't worry Rajan, You'll definitely get good at English, Keep practicing daily, okay? So, where's your hometown? MySivi, 50 LAKHS.
summary: The ad follows a user's 15-day journey of improving her English speaking skills by practicing with other users on the MySivi app. The presenter highlights that the platform has over 50 lakh supportive co-learners to practice with. It concludes with a call to action to download the app and start speaking confidently.
